prompt: Transform into a graph with a handwritten style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to re-render the existing mind map as a graph in a handwritten style. All elements, including the circular nodes, connecting lines, and text labels, should appear as if drawn and written by hand. Specifically, render the circles with slightly imperfect, hand-drawn shapes, the lines as irregular and sketchy, and all text with a consistent handwritten typeface. Maintain the original layout, node positions, and color scheme.
objects: Hand-drawn light green circular nodes ("Football", "Swimming", "Water Aerobics", "Water Polo")
All text labels with a consistent handwritten typeface
